series_metadata.series_description: This report shows all collateral that was pledged to the Treasurer or released back to depository banks on any given business day. R.C. Chapter 135 requires that depository banks collateralize deposits of public funds. A computer script automatically generates this report at the conclusion of each business day.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: conclusion of fiscal year in which report was generated, an additional 4 fiscal years. ; Electronic: conclusion of fiscal year in which report was generated, an additional 4 fiscal years
